groups.theme: Positive emotional support and mental health benefits
example_reviews: fantastic app truly helpful supporting one work problem find solution
really helped turn negative thought positive mindset
groups.notes: Refined overly broad positive group by focusing specifically on emotional support and removed unrelated or duplicate reviews.

groups.theme: Technical issues including crashes, glitches, and data loss
example_reviews: kept glitching saying check erasing long conversation
downloaded two time time app work
groups.notes: Narrowed negative group to only include performance-related issues such as crashes and glitches.

groups.theme: AI responses feel repetitive, irrelevant, or robotic
example_reviews: slow unoptimized response feel robotic relevant said
ai chat give useful insight keep repeating thing frustrating
groups.notes: Separated chatbot quality issues from general feedback to create a more precise grouping.

example_reviews: really good app would better remembers every conversation
please update ai speak language besides english
groups.notes: Focused on explicit user suggestions for improvements and removed overlapping reviews from other groups.

groups.theme: Accessibility and usability barriers (language and onboarding)
example_reviews: intake process frustratingly rigid intrusive demand personal data
please update ai speak language besides english indonesian
groups.notes: Clarified mixed group by focusing specifically on accessibility and onboarding challenges.
